source.section: 2 - Air-to-Ground Weapons > 2.9 - AGM-88C HARM Anti-Radiation Missile > 2.9.2 - AGM-88C HARM (SP)

steps.voiced: Set Master Arm switch to ARM.

steps.action: Set the TAC EW (Early Warning) page on the right DDI and the SMS (Stores Management System) page on the left DDI.
steps.voiced: Set TAC EW on the right DDI and SMS on the left DDI.

steps.action: In SMS (Stores Management System) page, click on the OSB next to HARM to select it
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to HARM to select it.

steps.action: Consult the HUD, RWR or EW page ands select which emitter you want to track by pressing the RAID / FLIR Button (“I” binding). There is no range information available.
steps.voiced: Select your emitter on the HUD, RWR, or EW page using the RAID/FLIR Button — no range available in SP mode.
